tasks.label: Git status et push
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && git status --short && git diff --stat HEAD && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'chore: sync tasks et arbre repo' --allow-empty && git push origin main && echo PUSH_OK
tasks.detail: Stage tout, commit si besoin, pousse sur main.

tasks.label: Git commit push et deployer
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && git add package.json package-lock.json app/backend/package.json .vscode/tasks.json && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'fix: eliminer 8 vulnerabilites moderees uuid via override npm root' && git push origin main && echo '--- push OK --- CI/CD backend deploy declenche sur GitHub Actions ---'
tasks.detail: Stage les fichiers corriges, commit, pousse sur main et declenche le deploy CI/CD.

tasks.label: Git push origin main
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && git push origin main && echo PUSH_OK
tasks.detail: Pousse la branche main vers origin.

tasks.label: Apercu web local
tasks.detail: Lance l'application Flutter Web sur le port 8081 pour un apercu local.

tasks.label: Apercu build GitHub Pages
args: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4173 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory flutter_app/build/web
tasks.detail: Construit puis sert la version Flutter Web utilisee par GitHub Pages sur le port 4173.

tasks.label: Flutter generer web
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter create . --platforms=web
tasks.detail: Genere les fichiers plateforme Flutter Web autour du squelette existant.

tasks.label: Flutter apercu web
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter run -d web-server --web-hostname 0.0.0.0 --web-port=8081 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}
tasks.detail: Lance le port Flutter Web local sur le port 8081.

tasks.label: Flutter build GitHub Pages
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter build web --release --base-href /citoyen-peyi/ --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}
tasks.detail: Construit la version Flutter Web de production pour GitHub Pages.

tasks.label: Flutter build Firebase Hosting
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter build web --release --base-href / --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}
tasks.detail: Construit Flutter Web avec base-href / pour Firebase Hosting (citoyen-peyi.web.app).

tasks.label: Firebase deployer hosting
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && npx --yes firebase-tools@13 deploy --config firebase.ghpages.json --only hosting --project citoyen-peyi && echo DEPLOY_OK
tasks.detail: Deploie flutter_app/build/web sur citoyen-peyi.web.app via Firebase Hosting.

tasks.label: Git publier full Flutter
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: make app fully Flutter" && git checkout main && git merge --ff-only fix/ui-ux-security-hardening && git push origin main
tasks.detail: Stage, commit, fast-forward main puis pousse la migration full Flutter.

tasks.label: Backend verifier prerequis migration
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && pwd && command -v node && command -v npm && printenv | grep -E "^(GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS|FIREBASE_ADMIN_PROJECT_ID|FIREBASE_ADMIN_CLIENT_EMAIL|FIREBASE_ADMIN_PRIVATE_KEY|VOTE_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET|SUPER_ADMIN_KEY)=" || true
tasks.detail: Verifie Node/NPM et les variables d'environnement utiles a la migration backend.

tasks.label: Backend migration citizen codes dry-run
tasks.detail: Execute la migration registrationCodes vers citizen_access_codes en mode dry-run.

tasks.label: Backend migration citizen codes
tasks.detail: Execute la migration registrationCodes vers citizen_access_codes en base.

tasks.label: Backend installer dependances
tasks.detail: Installe les dependances npm du backend.

tasks.label: Backend tests
tasks.detail: Lance les tests Node du backend.

tasks.label: Flutter tests
tasks.detail: Lance les tests Flutter du port web.

tasks.label: Flutter analyze
tasks.detail: Analyse statique Flutter du port web.

tasks.label: Firestore rules tests
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi/tests/firestore-rules && npm install --no-package-lock && npx --yes firebase-tools@13 emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-citoyen-peyi "npm test"; status=$?; rm -rf node_modules; exit $status
tasks.detail: Lance les tests unitaires des regles Firestore via emulateur.
